definitions.vi: Có nhiều sự đa dạng hoặc sự phong phú.
definitions.en: Having a lot of variety or richness.

example.vi: Cuộc sống ở thành phố này rất phong phú.
example.es: La vida en esta ciudad es muy rica.
example.en: Life in this city is very rich.

exampleSentencesTranslated: Vietnamese cuisine is rich and diverse with many special dishes.
The school library has rich and diverse books for all ages.
Rich and diverse work experience helps him feel more confident in interviews.

translation.en: The library has a rich collection of books.

notes_md:
**Phong phú** means *rich, abundant, and diverse*. It’s about having a lot of variety, not just a big quantity.

It’s an adjective. It describes things like food, culture, ideas, knowledge, experience, or nature — anything that can have many different types or aspects.  

It often follows the noun: **N + phong phú**. You can also say **rất phong phú** to emphasize.  

Close synonyms: **đa dạng** (diverse) — very similar, but *phong phú* feels a bit “richer” and fuller. Opposite: **nghèo nàn** (poor, lacking variety).
notes:

It’s an adjective. It describes things like food, culture, ideas, knowledge, experience, or nature — anything that can have many different types or aspects.  

It often follows the noun: N + phong phú. You can also say rất phong phú to emphasize.  

Close synonyms: đa dạng (diverse) — very similar, but phong phú feels a bit “richer” and fuller. Opposite: nghèo nàn (poor, lacking variety).
exampleSentences: Ẩm thực Việt Nam rất phong phú với nhiều món ăn đặc biệt.
Thư viện của trường em có nhiều sách phong phú cho mọi lứa tuổi.
Kinh nghiệm làm việc phong phú giúp anh tự tin hơn khi phỏng vấn.
